strengths: 20 years of software development experience with multiple senior/staff roles; far exceeds 6+ year requirement
Demonstrated full-stack expertise in core technologies: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD)
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly addressing the required AI agent development skill
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience despite being a primary stack requirement; would need clarification
Limited explicit evidence of production-level cloud platform depth (AWS/GCP/Azure); Kubernetes mentioned only in open-source GISCollective context
Vitest not mentioned in testing framework experience; resume shows Jest and Selenium but not this specific primary framework
response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional depth with 20 years of software development and proven expertise in core full-stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His current role includes AI-agent infrastructure work with MCP code generators, directly addressing a required skill. However, the resume lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest—both primary stack components—and shows limited evidence of production cloud platform or Kubernetes experience. His strong engineering foundation and commitment to quality (TDD, testing frameworks) suggest capability, but framework-specific gaps and cloud infrastructure depth would warrant technical discussion before moving forward.
